steps.title: Add the known angles
steps.content:
The two given angles in the triangle measure $55^{\circ}$ and $18^{\circ}$:
$$55^{\circ}+18^{\circ}=73^{\circ}$$

steps.title: Subtract from the triangle total
steps.content:
Angles in a triangle sum to $180^{\circ}$, so subtract the known total from $180^{\circ}$:
$$180^{\circ}-73^{\circ}=107^{\circ}$$The answer is D.
